name: ALERT@SherrodBrown.com
subject: Please give $26 before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Tough re-elections are nothing new Peter. In 2012, special interest groups spent more than $40 million against us. They wanted Sherrod gone, and they weren't shy about spending money to make that happen. The press called him the "Hunted Democrat." But Team Sherrod stepped up. We organized. We mobilized. And when the polls closed and all the votes were counted, we came out ahead. We're up against some tough challenges in this campaign, too. Trump's hand-picked candidate, Congressman Jim Renacci, is winning in his primary. There are new attack ads out against us. Trump's standing is on the rise in Ohio. He has visited the Buckeye state four times since Inauguration Day -- including a visit just last Friday. [**_Just like in 2012, we need your help to come out ahead. Our first big FEC deadline of the election year is at midnight. Can you match our $26 average online contribution and help us reach our $320,000 goal?_**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb98/4462dc26/41037e07/20004a1f/653294855/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzMxcG0zIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180331pm3?refcode=sbe180331pm3_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb98/4462dc26/41037e07/20004a1e/653294855/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzMxcG0zIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180331pm3?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180331pm3_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb98/4462dc26/41037e07/20004a1e/653294855/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzMxcG0zIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180331pm3?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180331pm3_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb98/4462dc26/41037e07/20004a1e/653294855/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzMxcG0zIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180331pm3?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180331pm3_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb98/4462dc26/41037e07/20004a1f/653294855/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzMxcG0zIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180331pm3?refcode=sbe180331pm3_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** A lot has changed since 2012. Trump is in the White House. Republicans control Congress. We have to work a lot harder to protect the progressive values we care about. But some things don't change: **Sherrod is still fighting like hell for Ohio families.** He is still working to level the playing field for Ohio businesses and workers. He's still dedicated to protecting access to quality, affordable healthcare. **And I'm still counting on you to help us beat back the special interest cash and win in November.** **[**_Match our average online contribution of $26 before the FEC deadline._**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb98/4462dc26/41037e07/20004a1f/653294855/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzMxcG0zIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180331pm3?refcode=sbe180331pm3_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** With gratitude, Team Sherrod
---

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb98/4462dc26/41037e07/20004a1d/653294855/VEsD/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/") [Poll Source](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb98/4462dc26/41037e07/20004a1c/653294855/VEsA/ "https://www.axios.com/axios-surveymonkey-big-warning-signs-senate-democrats-09986026-50aa-46df-8094-574cfe5065a3.html")
| | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Debbie=E2=80=99s_iPad?=
subject: This can't wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Apologies for the short message, but this can't wait. We need to bump up our efforts now so we can meet our $30,000 goal before the deadline. With Trump in the White House, Republicans in complete control of Washington, and five opponents running against me, we can't fall short. **Consider this a personal request from me -- if you can, make a contribution at this secure link:[_www.DebbieWassermanSchultz.com/FirstFECGoal_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ff2/622b7b5b/1a30caca/307b8aa3/287965111/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180327pm?refcode=dwse180327pm_m&recurring=true&amount=5")** Thank you, Debbie Sent from my iPad. Sorry for any typos
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ff2/622b7b5b/1a30caca/307b8aa2/287965111/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: The last but most important email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | I know we've messaged you a lot over the past few weeks. Trust me -- I'm ready for this quarter to end, too. **Before it ends, however, we need to reach our FEC goal.** Kimberly, our Finance Director, just checked the numbers, and we're so close. The problem is we're running out of time. We only have 3 hours until our midnight deadline. [**_This is our last hope. Will you make sure we reach our goal? Rush in $5 if you can._**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb9b/4462dc26/41e983d3/20004a28/630522484/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzMxcG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180331pm2?refcode=sbe180331pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb9b/4462dc26/41e983d3/20004a2f/630522484/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzMxcG0yIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180331pm2?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180331pm2_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb9b/4462dc26/41e983d3/20004a2f/630522484/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzMxcG0yIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180331pm2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180331pm2_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb9b/4462dc26/41e983d3/20004a2f/630522484/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzMxcG0yIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180331pm2?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180331pm2_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb9b/4462dc26/41e983d3/20004a28/630522484/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzMxcG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180331pm2?refcode=sbe180331pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** Thank you for all your hard work this month. We'll talk to you in April, Sherrod | | | [Donate](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb9b/4462dc26/41e983d3/20004a28/630522484/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzMxcG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180331pm2?refcode=sbe180331pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

name: DSCC Deadline Alert
subject: Last chance: the deadline is here!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Now's not the time to miss a critical goal (and a chance to TRIPLE MATCH your gift!), team. And we're counting on our best supporters to help put us over the top. Can we count on you to step up
---

Now's not the time to miss a critical goal (and a chance to TRIPLE-MATCH your gift!), team.

Especially not in an election year when the stakes are so high -- and the GOP isn't sitting on the sidelines.

And we're still **$4,952** away from reaching our make-or-break March goal.

Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954caab/2b07114c/162a17889/731e4a9a/313726866/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954caab/2b07114c/162a17889/731e4a95/313726866/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954caab/2b07114c/162a17889/731e4a94/313726866/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

body:

| Who should run for President in 2020? Select all the Democrats you could support for President against Donald Trump in 2020. Joe Biden, former Vice President Cory Booker, New Jersey Senator Julian Castro, former HUD Secretary Andrew Cuomo, New York Governor Eric Garcetti, Los Angeles Mayor Kirsten Gillibrand, New York Senator Kamala Harris, California Senator Eric Holder, former Attorney General John Hickenlooper, Colorado Governor Amy Klobuchar, Minnesota Senator Deval Patrick, former Massachusetts Governor Bernie Sanders, Vermont Senator Tom Steyer, Environmental and Trump Impeachment advocate Elizabeth Warren, Massachusetts Senator Oprah Winfrey, Media Entrepreneur None of the above - I support Donald Trump *By answering this survey, you are subscribing to our newsletter. When you click 'Submit & Join', you will leave this page and see the results of this survey so far. [If you are having trouble, click here.](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100147810.545750.14&gen=1) We really appreciate your participation in this survey, as we launch our campaign to **identify every Democratic voter we can and make sure they vote in November.** If you'd like to help us organize, [please join our Facebook community](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100147810.545750.14&gen=1&mailing_linkid=1460). name: Jason Yates
subject: He has risen!
body:
| | Today is the cornerstone to our worldview
---
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180401com01&n=1)
| Peter, He has risen! Jesus said, “I am the resurrection and the life. The one who believes in me will live, even though they die” (John 11:25). Christian apologist Ravi Zacharias said, “Jesus Christ did not come to make bad people good, but to make dead people alive.” We have eternal life and life abundantly today because of Christ’s death on the cross and His resurrection from the grave! I don’t know about you, but reflecting on Christ’s death and resurrection strengthens my deep gratitude and desire to serve Him and make Him known! We stand upon the word of God because of the resurrection. Without the resurrection, there is nothing to stand on and in our case, no principles to defend. Josh McDowell sums it up well. “Few people seem to realize that the resurrection of Jesus is the cornerstone to a worldview that provides the perspective to all of life.” You see, the resurrection not only gave eternal life to all who accept Jesus Christ as their Lord and Savior, but it also gifted a unique perspective – a worldview – a perspective to all of life! Let our prayer be to daily walk in the power of the resurrection. _“Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! According to his great mercy, he has caused us to be born again to a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead, to an inheritance that is imperishable, undefiled, and unfading, kept in heaven for you.”1 Peter 1:3-4_ May you and your family rejoice in the truth of Christ’s resurrection today! Happy Easter! Jason Yates
CEO
My Faith Votes
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180401com01&n=2).
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180401com01&n=3) [ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.twitter.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180401com01&n=4) [ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180401com01&n=5)
